title.en: DSSS Clause 15 Remainder, Part 2: Transmit Power & Spectral Mask, RF Carrier Suppression, Modulation Accuracy, Receiver Sensitivity, and TXTIME
title.zh: DSSS 第 15 章余项之二：发射功率与频谱模板、载波抑制、调制精度、接收灵敏度与 TXTIME

blocks.en: The original 1 / 2 Mb/s DSSS radio was the first Wi-Fi PHY to share the crowded 2.4 GHz band with appliances, cordless phones, and other people's networks. Clause 15.4.5 (transmit) and 15.4.6 (receive) are the radio's quality contract: a list of numeric limits that, if every vendor meets them, lets independently built radios coexist without shouting over each other. This lesson walks the contract group by group — what each limit is, and the physical-coexistence reason it exists.
blocks.zh: 最初的 1 / 2 Mb/s DSSS 无线电是第一个要与各种家电、无绳电话以及别人家网络共享拥挤的 2.4 GHz 频段的 Wi-Fi 物理层。第 15.4.5 节（发射）与 15.4.6 节（接收）正是这个无线电的“质量契约”：一份数值上限清单——只要每家厂商都达标，独立设计出来的无线电就能彼此共存、而不会互相“盖过”对方。本课逐组讲解这份契约：每条限制是什么，以及它存在背后的物理共存原因。

blocks.en: Start with how loud the radio may be. The maximum output power is whatever the local regulator allows (15.4.5.2), but the floor is fixed by the standard: at least 1 mW must be transmittable (15.4.5.3) so a compliant radio is never too quiet to be heard. Anything transmitting above 100 mW must add transmit power control (15.4.5.4) — up to four levels, and at minimum the ability to drop back to 100 mW or less — so a strong radio can turn itself down when it doesn't need full power and stop drowning its neighbours.
blocks.zh: 先看无线电能“多大声”。最大输出功率由当地监管机构规定（15.4.5.2），但下限由标准固定：至少要能发出 1 mW（15.4.5.3），这样一个合规无线电绝不会安静到无法被听见。任何发射功率高于 100 mW 的无线电都必须加入发射功率控制（15.4.5.4）——最多四档，且至少要能回落到 100 mW 或更低——这样大功率无线电在不需要满功率时就能自降，避免“盖住”邻居。

blocks.en: Next, how the energy is shaped in frequency. The transmit spectral mask (15.4.5.5) is the envelope the signal must stay under as you move away from the channel centre: roughly full power within ±11 MHz, down 30 dBr from 11 to 22 MHz out, and down 50 dBr beyond 22 MHz, never exceeding the higher of that mask or −53 dBm/MHz. The mask is what keeps your transmission from spilling into adjacent channels. Two clocks must also stay honest: the centre frequency tolerance (15.4.5.6) and the chip clock tolerance (15.4.5.7) are each ±25 ppm, so transmitter and receiver agree on where the channel is and how fast the chips arrive.
blocks.zh: 接下来是能量在频域上如何“成形”。发射频谱模板（15.4.5.5）是信号随着偏离信道中心频率时必须保持在其下方的包络：在 ±11 MHz 内大致为满功率，偏离 11 到 22 MHz 处下降 30 dBr，偏离超过 22 MHz 处下降 50 dBr，且任何频偏处都不得超过该模板与 −53 dBm/MHz 二者中的较高值。正是这个模板防止你的发射“溢出”到相邻信道。还有两个时钟必须保持精准：中心频率容差（15.4.5.6）与码片时钟容差（15.4.5.7）各为 ±25 ppm，从而让发射端和接收端对“信道在哪里”以及“码片以多快速度到达”达成一致。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 420 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'><line x1='40' y1='200' x2='400' y2='200'/><line x1='40' y1='200' x2='40' y2='20'/><text x='8' y='40' font-size='10' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>0 dBr</text><text x='2' y='110' font-size='10' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>-30</text><text x='2' y='165' font-size='10' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>-50</text><line x1='180' y1='40' x2='260' y2='40'/><line x1='180' y1='40' x2='180' y2='110'/><line x1='180' y1='110' x2='130' y2='110'/><line x1='130' y1='110' x2='130' y2='165'/><line x1='130' y1='165' x2='60' y2='165'/><line x1='260' y1='40' x2='260' y2='110'/><line x1='260' y1='110' x2='310' y2='110'/><line x1='310' y1='110' x2='310' y2='165'/><line x1='310' y1='165' x2='380' y2='165'/><line x1='220' y1='200' x2='220' y2='30' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><text x='205' y='218' font-size='10' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>fc</text><text x='112' y='218' font-size='9' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>-11</text><text x='258' y='218' font-size='9' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>+11</text><text x='62' y='218' font-size='9' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>-22</text><text x='308' y='218' font-size='9' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>+22 MHz</text></svg>

caption.en: The DSSS transmit spectral mask (15.4.5.5): ~0 dBr within ±11 MHz of the centre, stepping down to −30 dBr and −50 dBr as you move outward — the envelope that limits spill into neighbouring channels.
caption.zh: DSSS 发射频谱模板（15.4.5.5）：在中心频率 ±11 MHz 内约为 0 dBr，向外依次降到 −30 dBr 与 −50 dBr——这就是限制能量溢出到相邻信道的包络。

blocks.en: Three more transmit limits police the edges of a burst and the cleanliness of the carrier. The power-on / power-down ramp (15.4.5.8) must each take no more than 2 µs for the 10%-to-90% transition, so turning the transmitter on and off doesn't splatter energy across the band. RF carrier suppression (15.4.5.9) requires the residual unmodulated carrier leak to sit at least 15 dB below the signal peak — a strong carrier spike would waste power and interfere. Transmit modulation accuracy (15.4.5.10) caps the worst-case error-vector magnitude at 0.35 against the ideal DQPSK constellation points, so the symbols a receiver sees are close enough to the textbook positions to be decoded reliably. Finally, time-of-departure accuracy (15.4.5.11) bounds the RMS error of the reported transmit timestamp to ≤ 80 ns, which is what makes this old PHY usable for ranging.
blocks.zh: 另有三条发射限制管住一次突发的“边沿”以及载波的“纯净度”。功率上升/下降斜坡（15.4.5.8）的 10%–90% 过渡各自不得超过 2 µs，这样开关发射机时不会把能量“溅”到整个频段。RF 载波抑制（15.4.5.9）要求残留的未调制载波泄漏至少比信号峰值低 15 dB——过强的载波尖峰既浪费功率又会造成干扰。发射调制精度（15.4.5.10）将最坏情况下的误差矢量幅度（相对理想 DQPSK 星座点）限制在 0.35 以内，从而让接收端看到的符号足够接近“教科书位置”、能被可靠解调。最后，离开时间精度（15.4.5.11）将上报发射时间戳的 RMS 误差限制在 ≤ 80 ns，正是这一点让这个古老物理层也能用于测距。

blocks.en: Notice the symmetry: the transmit mask, carrier suppression, ramps, and modulation accuracy all describe a polite transmitter; the receiver specs that follow describe a tolerant listener. Coexistence needs both — a well-behaved talker is wasted if the listener can't pull a weak signal out of a noisy room.
blocks.zh: 注意这种对称性：发射模板、载波抑制、斜坡和调制精度共同描绘了一个“有礼貌的发射机”；紧随其后的接收规范则描绘了一个“宽容的倾听者”。共存需要二者兼备——若倾听者无法从嘈杂环境里捞出微弱信号，那么一个守规矩的讲话者也就白费了。

blocks.en: On the receive side the contract flips to sensitivity and robustness. Minimum input sensitivity (15.4.6.2) requires a packet error rate below 8×10⁻² on a 1024-octet PSDU at just −80 dBm input (2 Mb/s DQPSK) — the radio must hear very faint signals. Maximum input level (15.4.6.3) says it must also still work at −4 dBm — close to a shouting neighbour — without saturating. Adjacent-channel rejection (15.4.6.4) demands ≥35 dB of rejection between channels ≥30 MHz apart, so a loud transmitter on a far channel doesn't blind you. CCA (15.4.6.5) is the listen-before-talk rule: report the medium busy on energy above the ED threshold (Mode 1), on detecting a DSSS signal (Mode 2), on both (Mode 3), and always on any energy above −62 dBm (Mode 6) — and once a valid PHY header is decoded, don't declare idle until the PPDU's TXTIME elapses. RCPI (15.4.6.6) is the per-frame received-power reading, accurate to ±5 dB.
blocks.zh: 在接收侧，契约转向灵敏度与鲁棒性。接收最小输入灵敏度（15.4.6.2）要求：在 −80 dBm 输入下（2 Mb/s DQPSK）、对 1024 字节 PSDU 的分组错误率低于 8×10⁻²——无线电必须能听见非常微弱的信号。最大输入电平（15.4.6.3）则规定它在 −4 dBm 下（几乎是个“在喊叫的邻居”）也仍要正常工作、不被饱和。相邻信道抑制（15.4.6.4）要求间隔 ≥30 MHz 的信道之间抑制度 ≥35 dB，这样远处某个大功率发射机不会把你“致盲”。CCA（15.4.6.5）是“先听后讲”规则：能量超过 ED 门限时报忙（模式 1）、检测到 DSSS 信号时报忙（模式 2）、二者皆满足时报忙（模式 3），以及任何能量超过 −62 dBm 时始终报忙（模式 6）——并且一旦解出有效的 PHY 头部，在该 PPDU 的 TXTIME 走完之前都不得宣告空闲。RCPI（15.4.6.6）则是逐帧的接收功率读数，精度为 ±5 dB。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
    A[Energy arrives at antenna] --> B{CCA evaluation}
    B -->|Energy > ED threshold| C[PHY-CCA.indication BUSY]
    B -->|Valid DSSS signal detected| C
    B -->|Any energy > -62 dBm| C
    B -->|Nothing above thresholds| D[PHY-CCA.indication IDLE]
    C --> E{Valid PHY header decoded?}
    E -->|Yes| F[Stay BUSY until TXTIME elapses]
    E -->|No| B
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
    A[能量到达天线] --> B{CCA 评估}
    B -->|能量 > ED 门限| C[PHY-CCA.indication 忙]
    B -->|检测到有效 DSSS 信号| C
    B -->|任何能量 > -62 dBm| C
    B -->|均未超过门限| D[PHY-CCA.indication 空闲]
    C --> E{是否解出有效 PHY 头部?}
    E -->|是| F[保持忙直到 TXTIME 走完]
    E -->|否| B

blocks.en: The contract closes by telling the MAC exactly how long a transmission owns the air. TXTIME (15.4.6.7) is computed as a fixed 144 µs preamble plus a 48 µs PHY header plus the payload time (LENGTH×8 ÷ DATARATE). That single number is what the CCA rule above counts down, what neighbours infer from the decoded header, and what the MAC uses to set its timers — so the whole listen-before-talk dance is built on one predictable duration.
blocks.zh: 契约的收尾，是告诉 MAC 一次发射究竟占用空口多久。TXTIME（15.4.6.7）的计算为：固定 144 µs 前导 + 48 µs PHY 头部 + 净荷时间（LENGTH×8 ÷ DATARATE）。这一个数字，正是上面 CCA 规则倒计时所用的值、邻居从解出的头部推断出的值，也是 MAC 用来设置定时器的值——于是整套“先听后讲”的舞步都建立在这一个可预测的时长之上。

summary.en: The exact mask numbers, the EVM cap, and the TXTIME equation
summary.zh: 精确的模板数值、EVM 上限与 TXTIME 公式

blocks.en: Clause 15.4.5.5 builds the mask in two steps: an interim mask of 0 dBr for fc−11 MHz < f < fc+11 MHz, −30 dBr for the 11-to-22 MHz skirts, and −50 dBr beyond 22 MHz, measured with 100 kHz resolution / 30 kHz video bandwidth; the overall mask is the higher of that interim mask and −53 dBm/MHz at each offset. Carrier suppression (15.4.5.9) is measured on a repetitive 01 pattern with the scrambler off under DQPSK and must be ≥15 dB below the sin(x)/x peak. Modulation accuracy (15.4.5.10) requires Verr(n) < 0.35 over 1000 dc-corrected, normalised I/Q samples against the four ideal DQPSK points (±0.707, ±0.707). On receive, CCA Mode 6 is always required alongside one of Modes 1/2/3, with the ED threshold ≤ −80 dBm above 100 mW, −76 dBm for 50-100 mW, and −70 dBm at/below 50 mW. TXTIME (15.4.6.7) = PreambleLength (144 µs) + PHYHeaderTime (48 µs) + ⌈(LENGTH×8)/DATARATE⌉, with LENGTH in octets and DATARATE in Mb/s.
blocks.zh: 第 15.4.5.5 节分两步构建模板：临时模板在 fc−11 MHz < f < fc+11 MHz 处为 0 dBr，在 11 到 22 MHz 的裙边为 −30 dBr，偏离超过 22 MHz 处为 −50 dBr，测量采用 100 kHz 分辨率带宽 / 30 kHz 视频带宽；整体模板取该临时模板与 −53 dBm/MHz 在每个频偏处的较高者。载波抑制（15.4.5.9）在关闭扰码器、采用 DQPSK 的重复 01 序列上测量，必须比 sin(x)/x 峰值低 ≥15 dB。调制精度（15.4.5.10）要求在 1000 个经直流校正、归一化的 I/Q 样本上、相对四个理想 DQPSK 点（±0.707, ±0.707）满足 Verr(n) < 0.35。在接收侧，CCA 模式 6 始终与模式 1/2/3 之一并存，ED 门限在发射功率 >100 mW 时 ≤ −80 dBm，50-100 mW 时为 −76 dBm，≤50 mW 时为 −70 dBm。TXTIME（15.4.6.7）= 前导长度（144 µs）+ PHY 头部时间（48 µs）+ ⌈(LENGTH×8)/DATARATE⌉，其中 LENGTH 单位为字节、DATARATE 单位为 Mb/s。

cites.note: 15.4.5.1-15.4.5.4 — transmit intro, power levels, minimum 1 mW, power control above 100 mW
15.4.5.5-15.4.5.9 — spectral mask, center-frequency / chip-clock tolerance, power ramps, RF carrier suppression
15.4.5.10-15.4.5.11 — transmit modulation accuracy (EVM < 0.35) and time-of-departure accuracy (<= 80 ns)
15.4.6.1-15.4.6.7 — receiver sensitivity, max input, adjacent-channel rejection, CCA modes, RCPI, DSSS TXTIME
